ocr_text: 18+; T-72 "КОНІВНИК" (T-72 "Groom/Horseman"); T-72 "СОКІЛ" (T-72 "Falcon"); БАТАЛЬЙОН К-2 (K-2 Battalion); 54 ОМБР (54th Separate Mechanized Brigade); ЧАМО-82 (CHAMO-82)
assessment_reasoning: The image clearly depicts two tanks operating in a field. Tanks are inherently military assets, indicating potential for offensive or defensive military operations. The presence of unit designations (54th Separate Mechanized Brigade, K-2 Battalion) further confirms a military context. The location within Ukraine, combined with the timestamp, suggests activity related to the ongoing conflict.
